title: BG Electrical NBS74-01 Switched Cooker Control Unit with a Power Indicator, 45 Amp, Brushed Steel
features: SLEEK AND SLIM COOKER SWITCH WITH LED POWER INDICATOR: This 45A cooker control switch has a brushed steel finish with anti-fingerprint lacquer and power indicator. Double pole switching and twin Earth ensure a safer installation
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a raised rounded profile – combining quality with modern elegance
COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires. Fits a 47mm back box, ideal for retrofit
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switch
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
